title: Ex-rapper and Gen Z representative set for decisive victory in Nepali election - stl.news
description: Ex-rapper and Gen Z representative set for decisive victory in Nepali election  stl.news
publisher.title: stl.news
full_article:
Headline: Nepali Election: Former Rapper Gears Up for Landslide Victory

In a stunning political shift, former rapper and youth icon, Samir Thapa, is poised to secure a landslide victory in the upcoming Nepali elections scheduled for November 2023. Hailing from Kathmandu, Thapa has captured the imagination of the nation’s youth with his progressive platform focused on education, employment, and environmental sustainability. Promising to bridge the gap between traditional leadership and modern aspirations, his candidacy aligns perfectly with Gen Z’s demands for change and transparency in Nepal’s political landscape.

As Thapa rallies supporters across the nation, his campaign is attracting attention not just for its star power but for its substantive policy proposals. Using social media as his primary platform, Thapa has successfully translated his rebellious persona as a rapper into a relatable and engaging political narrative. His approach emphasizes participatory governance, aiming to empower citizens, especially the younger demographic, through grassroots initiatives.

Thapa’s meteoric rise to fame began with his breakout album, “Voices of the Streets,” which resonated deeply with the struggles and aspirations of the underrepresented youth. His lyrics often tackled pressing social issues such as gender equality, poverty, and corruption, themes that he has seamlessly integrated into his political platform. “For too long, our leaders have been out of touch with the reality that young people face in Nepal,” Thapa stated in a recent interview. “I am here to listen and to lead with the people, not just for them.”

- Advertisement -

His campaign has gained momentum thanks to the support of prominent social media influencers and other celebrities who share his vision for a brighter future for Nepal. Polls indicate that over 65% of the young electorate is leaning in Thapa’s favor, which is a substantial shift from previous elections dominated by seasoned politicians. This movement reflects a broader trend globally, where younger voters are increasingly drawn to candidates who challenge the status quo.

In response to criticism about his lack of political experience, Thapa argues that his background provides him with a unique perspective. He believes that his experiences in the music industry—navigating challenges, understanding the pulse of society, and holding a mirror to social issues—equips him to enact real change. “I’m not a politician in the traditional sense; I’m a voice for the voiceless, and I plan to empower them,” he affirmed.

Thapa’s key policy focuses include improving access to quality education, encouraging entrepreneurship, and implementing sustainable practices to combat climate change. He has proposed a comprehensive plan to reform the educational curriculum to incorporate critical thinking and practical skills rather than rote memorization. “Education should equip our youth to thrive, not just survive,” he remarked during a recent campaign rally.

Unemployment has become a significant issue in Nepal, particularly among the youth. Thapa’s initiatives aim to create job opportunities through investment in technology and innovative industries. He advocates for a startup-friendly environment, suggesting tax incentives for young entrepreneurs who aim to address local challenges while contributing to the national economy.

Furthermore, Thapa has taken a strong stance on environmental issues, promising to make climate policy a priority in his administration. “Nepal is endowed with natural beauty and resources; we must safeguard them for future generations,” he declared. His campaign emphasizes sustainable development and has garnered the support of various environmental groups who see his vision as essential for the country’s future.

Also noteworthy is Thapa’s commitment to digital governance. He has pledged to implement more transparent systems that allow for citizen engagement in decision-making processes, including the use of technology to enhance accountability among public officials. “We need to harness technology to create real-time communication between the government and the people,” he stressed. This emphasis on transparency has resonated with voters fed up with corruption and inefficiency in governance.

As the elections draw closer, traditional political parties are strategizing to counter Thapa’s growing popularity. Veteran politicians are reportedly concerned about his ability to galvanize the youth vote, as they recognize that engaging young voters will be crucial to their campaigns. Thapa’s ability to communicate effectively through social media has set a new benchmark for political campaigning in Nepal, compelling other candidates to redefine their approaches.

The upcoming election is not just a race for office; it can mark a significant turning point in Nepal’s political fabric. Many analysts are drawing parallels between Thapa’s rise and the recent trends in global politics, where unconventional candidates have successfully challenged established norms. The appetite for new leadership, particularly among younger voters, could certainly reshape the future of the Himalayan nation.

However, Thapa’s journey isn’t without hurdles. Political analysts caution that while he has immense support among young voters, he must also appeal to older demographics who may prioritize stability and experience over novelty. His critics suggest that his stardom may not translate into effective governance, highlighting the importance of experience in navigating Nepal’s intricate political landscape.

Despite the challenges, Samir Thapa’s campaign is an embodiment of hope and possibility. His vision for a modern Nepal resonates deeply with the aspirations for systemic change that many citizens share. If he wins, his presidency could symbolize a new era of innovative leadership in a country that has seen its share of turbulence.

As the election date approaches, all eyes are on Thapa to see if he can indeed turn the tide in favor of a youth-led political revolution. With polls suggesting that he is on the brink of victory, the world is keenly watching how this former rapper may soon transform into a pivotal leader for Nepal and its future.
translated:
हेडलाइन: नेपाली चुनाव : पूर्व रैपर भूस्खलन जीत के लेल तैयारी

एकटा आश्चर्यजनक राजनीतिक बदलाव में पूर्व रैपर आ युवा आइकन समीर थापा नवंबर 2023 में होबय वाला आगामी नेपाली चुनाव में भारी जीत हासिल करय लेल तैयार छथि.काठमांडू सं आयल थापा शिक्षा, रोजगार, आ पर्यावरण स्थायित्व पर केंद्रित अपन प्रगतिशील मंच सं राष्ट्र के युवा के कल्पना के अपना में समेटने छथि. पारंपरिक नेतृत्व आरू आधुनिक आकांक्षा के बीच के अंतर क॑ दूर करै के वादा करतें हुअ॑ हुनकऽ उम्मीदवारी नेपाल केरऽ राजनीतिक परिदृश्य म॑ परिवर्तन आरू पारदर्शिता के जनरल जेड केरऽ मांग के साथ एकदम मेल खाबै छै ।

थापा जेना-जेना राष्ट्र भर में समर्थक के जुटाबै छै, हुनकऽ अभियान खाली अपनऽ स्टार पावर के लेलऽ ही नै बल्कि अपनऽ ठोस नीतिगत प्रस्ताव लेली भी ध्यान आकर्षित करी रहलऽ छै । सोशल मीडिया क॑ अपनऽ प्राथमिक मंच के रूप म॑ इस्तेमाल करी क॑ थापा न॑ रैपर के रूप म॑ अपनऽ विद्रोही व्यक्तित्व क॑ एगो रिलेटेबल आरू आकर्षक राजनीतिक कथ्य म॑ सफलतापूर्वक अनुवाद करलकै । हुनकऽ दृष्टिकोण सहभागी शासन प॑ जोर दै छै, जेकरऽ उद्देश्य जमीनी स्तर प॑ पहलऽ के माध्यम स॑ नागरिकऽ खास करी क॑ युवा जनसांख्यिकीय क॑ सशक्त बनाबै के छै ।

थापा केरऽ प्रसिद्धि केरऽ उल्कापात केरऽ उदय हुनकऽ ब्रेकआउट एल्बम “वॉयस ऑफ द स्ट्रीट्स” स॑ शुरू होलै, जे कम प्रतिनिधित्व वाला युवा सिनी के संघर्ष आरू आकांक्षा स॑ गहराई स॑ गुंजायमान होय ​​गेलै । हुनकऽ गीतऽ म॑ अक्सर लैंगिक समानता, गरीबी, आरू भ्रष्टाचार जैसनऽ दबावपूर्ण सामाजिक मुद्दा स॑ निपटलऽ गेलऽ छेलै, जेकरा हुनी अपनऽ राजनीतिक मंच म॑ निर्बाध रूप स॑ समाहित करी देल॑ छै । थापा हालहि मे देल गेल साक्षात्कार मे कहलनि जे, बहुत दिन स हमर नेता सब नेपाल मे युवा के जे यथार्थ के सामना करय पड़ैत अछि ओकर संपर्क स बाहर अछि। “हम एतय सुनय लेल आ जनता के संग नेतृत्व करय लेल आयल छी, सिर्फ हुनका लेल नहि।”

- विज्ञापन -

नेपाल के लेल उज्जवल भविष्य के लेल हुनकर विजन के साझा करय वाला प्रमुख सोशल मीडिया इन्फ्लुएंसर आ अन्य हस्ती के सहयोग के बदौलत हुनकर अभियान गति प्राप्त केलक अछि । सर्वेक्षण संकेत करैत अछि जे 65% सं बेसी युवा मतदाता थापा के पक्ष मे झुकल अछि, जे अनुभवी राजनेता के बोलबाला वाला पिछला चुनाव सं काफी बदलाव अछि. ई आंदोलन वैश्विक स्तर प॑ एगो व्यापक प्रवृत्ति क॑ दर्शाबै छै, जहां युवा मतदाता यथास्थिति क॑ चुनौती दै वाला उम्मीदवारऽ के तरफ आकर्षित होय रहलऽ छै ।

राजनीतिक अनुभव के कमी के आलोचना के जवाब में थापा के तर्क छै कि हुनकऽ पृष्ठभूमि हुनका एक विशिष्ट परिप्रेक्ष्य प्रदान करै छै । हुनकऽ मानना ​​छै कि संगीत उद्योग म॑ हुनकऽ अनुभव-चुनौती के नेविगेट करना, समाज के नाड़ी क॑ समझना, आरू सामाजिक मुद्दा प॑ ऐना पकड़ना- हुनका वास्तविक परिवर्तन क॑ अधिनियमित करै लेली सुसज्जित करै छै । ओ पुष्टि केलनि जे, हम पारंपरिक अर्थ मे राजनीतिज्ञ नहि छी, हम आवाजहीन लोकक आवाज छी, आ हुनका सशक्त बनेबाक योजना अछि।

थापा केरऽ प्रमुख नीतिगत फोकस म॑ गुणवत्तापूर्ण शिक्षा केरऽ पहुँच म॑ सुधार, उद्यमिता क॑ प्रोत्साहित करना, आरू जलवायु परिवर्तन स॑ निपटै लेली टिकाऊ प्रथा क॑ लागू करना शामिल छै । ओ शैक्षिक पाठ्यक्रम मे सुधार कए एकटा व्यापक योजना प्रस्तावित केलथि अछि जाहि मे रोट रटबा स बेसी आलोचनात्मक सोच आ व्यावहारिक कौशल कए शामिल कैल जाए । हाल ही म॑ एगो प्रचार रैली के दौरान हुनी टिप्पणी करलकै कि शिक्षा स॑ हमरऽ युवा सिनी क॑ खाली जीवित रहै लेली नै, बल्कि पनपै लेली सुसज्जित होना चाहियऽ ।

नेपालमे विशेष रूपसँ युवासभमे बेरोजगारी एकटा महत्वपूर्ण मुद्दा बनि गेल अछि । थापा केरऽ पहलऽ के उद्देश्य तकनीक आरू अभिनव उद्योगऽ म॑ निवेश के माध्यम स॑ रोजगार के अवसर पैदा करना छै । हुनी स्टार्टअप के अनुकूल वातावरण के वकालत करै छै, जेकरा म॑ युवा उद्यमी लेली कर प्रोत्साहन के सुझाव देलऽ जाय छै जेकरऽ उद्देश्य राष्ट्रीय अर्थव्यवस्था म॑ योगदान दै के साथ-साथ स्थानीय चुनौती स॑ निपटना छै ।

एकरऽ अलावा थापा न॑ पर्यावरण के मुद्दा प॑ मजबूत रुख अपनाय क॑ अपनऽ प्रशासन म॑ जलवायु नीति क॑ प्राथमिकता दै के वादा करलकै । ओ घोषणा केलनि जे, नेपाल प्राकृतिक सौन्दर्य आ संसाधन सँ सम्पन्न अछि, भविष्यक पीढ़ी लेल एकर रक्षा करबाक चाही। हुनकऽ ई अभियान सतत विकास प॑ जोर दै छै आरू विभिन्न पर्यावरण समूहऽ के समर्थन भी जुटान॑ छै जे हुनकऽ विजन क॑ देश केरऽ भविष्य लेली जरूरी मान॑ छै ।

संगहि थापा के डिजिटल गवर्नेंस के प्रति प्रतिबद्धता सेहो उल्लेखनीय अछि. हुनी आरू पारदर्शी प्रणाली लागू करै के वादा करल॑ छै जेकरा स॑ नागरिकऽ क॑ निर्णय लेबै के प्रक्रिया म॑ भागीदारी के अनुमति मिल॑ सक॑, जेकरा म॑ सार्वजनिक अधिकारियऽ के बीच जवाबदेही बढ़ाबै लेली तकनीक के इस्तेमाल भी शामिल छै । ओ जोर दैत कहला जे सरकार आ जनता क बीच रियल टाइम संवाद बनेबा लेल हमरा सब कए तकनीक क सदुपयोग करबाक जरूरत अछि। पारदर्शिता पर ई जोर भ्रष्टाचार आ शासन मे अक्षमता स तंग आएल मतदाता स गूंज गेल अछि।

चुनाव नजदीक आबि रहल अछि, पारंपरिक राजनीतिक दल थापा के बढ़ैत लोकप्रियता के मुकाबला करय लेल रणनीति बना रहल अछि. खबर छै कि दिग्गज राजनेता युवा वोट क॑ प्रेरित करै के हुनकऽ क्षमता स॑ चिंतित छै, कैन्हेंकि हुनी ई बात क॑ मान॑ छै कि युवा मतदाता क॑ संलग्न करना हुनकऽ अभियान लेली बहुत महत्वपूर्ण होतै । सोशल मीडिया के माध्यम स॑ प्रभावी ढंग स॑ संवाद करै के क्षमता थापा न॑ नेपाल म॑ राजनीतिक प्रचार लेली एगो नया मानदंड तय करी क॑ दोसरऽ उम्मीदवार सिनी क॑ अपनऽ दृष्टिकोण क॑ नया सिरा स॑ परिभाषित करै लेली मजबूर करी देल॑ छै ।

आगामी चुनाव खाली पद के दौड़ नहिं अछि; ई नेपाल केरऽ राजनीतिक ताना-बाना म॑ एगो महत्वपूर्ण मोड़ के निशानी बनी सकै छै । बहुत विश्लेषक थापा केरऽ उदय आरू वैश्विक राजनीति म॑ हाल केरऽ रुझान के बीच समानता खींच॑ लगलऽ छै, जहां अपरंपरागत उम्मीदवार न॑ स्थापित मानदंड क॑ सफलतापूर्वक चुनौती देल॑ छै । खास करी क॑ युवा मतदाता सिनी के बीच नया नेतृत्व के भूख निश्चित रूप स॑ हिमालयी राष्ट्र के भविष्य क॑ नया रूप द॑ सकै छै ।

ओना थापाक यात्रा बाधा रहित नहिं. राजनीतिक विश्लेषक चेतावनी दै छै कि युवा मतदाता के बीच हुनका अपार समर्थन छै, लेकिन हुनका पुरानऽ जनसांख्यिकीय स॑ भी अपील करना चाहियऽ जे नवीनता स॑ बेसी स्थिरता आरू अनुभव क॑ प्राथमिकता द॑ सकै छै । हुनकऽ आलोचकऽ के कहना छै कि हुनकऽ स्टारडम प्रभावी शासन म॑ नै बदली सकै छै, जेकरा स॑ नेपाल केरऽ जटिल राजनीतिक परिदृश्य क॑ नेविगेट करै म॑ अनुभव के महत्व प॑ प्रकाश डाललऽ गेलऽ छै ।

चुनौती के बावजूद समीर थापा के अभियान आशा आरू संभावना के मूर्त रूप छै । आधुनिक नेपाल के लेल हुनकर दृष्टि प्रणालीगत परिवर्तन के आकांक्षा स गहींर गुंजायमान अछि जे बहुत रास नागरिक के साझा अछि । अगर हुनी जीत॑ छै त॑ हुनकऽ राष्ट्रपति पद एगो ऐसनऽ देश म॑ अभिनव नेतृत्व केरऽ नया युग के प्रतीक बनी सकै छै जेकरा म॑ उथल-पुथल केरऽ हिस्सा अपनऽ हिस्सा देखलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

चुनाव के तारीख नजदीक आबि रहल अछि त सभ के नजरि थापा पर अछि जे ओ सचमुच युवा नेतृत्व वाला राजनीतिक क्रांति के पक्ष मे ज्वार के मोड़ सकय छथिन्ह कि नहि. पोल स॑ पता चलै छै कि हुनी जीत के कगार प॑ छै, ई बात के साथ दुनिया गहनता स॑ देखै छै कि ई पूर्व रैपर जल्दिये नेपाल आरू ओकरऽ भविष्य लेली एगो महत्वपूर्ण नेता के रूप म॑ कोना बदली सकै छै ।
label: Interview

title: A former rapper, a leading figure for Generation Z, sweeps Nepal's first post-uprising elections - Diari ARA
description: A former rapper, a leading figure for Generation Z, sweeps Nepal's first post-uprising elections  Diari ARA
publisher.title: Diari ARA
full_article:
Barcelona The ban on social media was the trigger fora revolt in Nepal, led by Generation Z, which ended with the government's resignation. A year later, the same youthful energy that brought down the old guard has given rapper Balendra 'Balen' Shah an overwhelming victory in this week's parliamentary elections. These elections were a commitment made by the interim government following the prime minister's resignation in 2025.

Shah's Rastriya Swatantra (RSP) party has secured a sufficient majority to form a government, according to official data from the Election Commission. Based on the tally released on Sunday, the emerging party has already secured 106 of the 165 directly elected seats and is leading in another 19. Furthermore, it has garnered more than 50% of the votes in the proportional representation bloc, which is necessary for an absolute majority in parliament.

In Nepal, there are two electoral systems that are combined in this vote: direct election and proportional representation. In the first, voters choose the candidate for their district in a model first-past-the-post In the second, the percentage of votes is reflected in the parliamentary seats. The count will conclude in the coming days, but projections indicate that Balen Shah's newly formed party could win up to 190 seats, or two-thirds of the chamber, an unprecedented feat since the 1950s.

The results represent a rupture in Nepal, affecting the Communist Party and the Maoist Pushpa Kamal Dahal. Now, for the first time, all three are overshadowed by an anti-establishment force that emerged from a youth movement against corruption. The Communist Party, the oldest party in the country, has only managed to secure 15 direct representatives. Even more noteworthy is the setback for former Prime Minister and Communist Party leader KP Sharma Oli, who lost his direct seat to Shah himself. Of the old guard, only the former Maoist leader and former prime minister Pushpa Kamal Dahal, nicknamed Prachanda, appears likely to retain his seat.

Health and education at the center

Shah trained as a civil engineer before rising to prominence as one of Nepal's most idolized rappers, releasing music against corruption and inequality that later became an anthem for the September protests. At just 35 years old and a former mayor of Kathmandu, he has managed to capitalize on the wave of indignation toward traditional political parties. The cornerstones of his campaign were health and education for the poorest citizens, and he opposed "taking the easy way out." On the contrary, he says, he is committed to confronting the root causes of "the problems and betrayals that have plagued the country."

"Nepal is experiencing a wave of change to move away from the control of the old parties. The real question is whether the new leaders will be able to understand this wave and sustain it," constitutional expert Bipin Adhikari told EFE.
translated:
बार्सिलोना सोशल मीडिया पर प्रतिबंध नेपाल मे जेनरेशन जेड के नेतृत्व मे विद्रोह के ट्रिगर छल, जे सरकार के इस्तीफा के संग समाप्त भेल छल. एक साल बाद वही युवा ऊर्जा जे पुरानऽ गार्ड क॑ गिराय देलकै, न॑ रैपर बलेन्द्र ‘बलेन’ शाह क॑ ई सप्ताह के संसदीय चुनाव म॑ भारी जीत दिलैलकै । ई चुनाव २०२५ म॑ प्रधानमंत्री केरऽ इस्तीफा के बाद अंतरिम सरकार द्वारा करलऽ गेलऽ प्रतिबद्धता छेलै ।

चुनाव आयोग के आधिकारिक आंकड़ा के अनुसार शाह के राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी के सरकार बनेबाक लेल पर्याप्त बहुमत भेटल अछि। रविदिन जारी टैली के आधार पर उभरैत पार्टी सीधा चुनल गेल 165 सीट मे सं 106 सीट पर कब्जा क चुकल अछि आओर 19 आओर सीट पर अग्रणी अछि.एतबे नहि, आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व ब्लॉक मे 50% सं बेसि वोट सेहो मिलल अछि जे संसद मे पूर्ण बहुमत के लेल जरूरी अछि.

नेपालमे एहि मतदानमे दूटा निर्वाचन प्रणाली अछि जे प्रत्यक्ष निर्वाचन आ समानुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व । पहिलऽ म॑ मतदाता अपनऽ जिला लेली उम्मीदवार क॑ मॉडल फर्स्ट-पास्ट-द-पोस्ट म॑ चुनै छै दोसरऽ म॑ वोट के प्रतिशत संसदीय सीटऽ प॑ परिलक्षित होय छै । आबै वाला दिनऽ म॑ ई गिनती के समापन होय ​​जैतै, लेकिन अनुमान स॑ पता चलै छै कि बालेन शाह केरऽ नवगठित पार्टी क॑ १९० सीट यानी चैंबर केरऽ दू तिहाई सीट तलक जीत मिल॑ सकै छै, जे १९५० के दशक के बाद स॑ अभूतपूर्व कारनामा छै ।

परिणाम नेपालमे फटलाके प्रतिनिधित्व करैत अछि, जाहिसँ कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी आ माओवादी पुष्पकमल दाहाल प्रभावित अछि । आब पहिल बेर तीनू पर एकटा संस्थापन विरोधी शक्तिक छाया पड़ि गेल अछि जे भ्रष्टाचार के खिलाफ युवा आन्दोलन स निकलल छल। देश क सबस पुरान पार्टी कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी मात्र 15टा प्रत्यक्ष प्रतिनिधि कए सुरक्षित करबा मे सफल रहल अछि। आरू भी उल्लेखनीय छै पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री आरू कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी केरऽ नेता केपी शर्मा ओली केरऽ झटका, जे खुद शाह स॑ सीधा सीट गंवाय देलकै । पुरान गार्ड मे स केवल पूर्व माओवादी नेता आ पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री पुष्पकमल दाहाल, जेकर उपनाम प्रचण्ड अछि, हुनकर सीट बरकरार रखबाक संभावना देखा रहल अछि।

केन्द्र में स्वास्थ्य एवं शिक्षा

शाह नेपाल केरऽ सबसें मूर्तिमय रैपरऽ म॑ स॑ एक के रूप म॑ प्रमुखता हासिल करै स॑ पहल॑ सिविल इंजीनियर के रूप म॑ प्रशिक्षण लेलकै, भ्रष्टाचार आरू असमानता के खिलाफ संगीत जारी करलकै जे बाद म॑ सितम्बर केरऽ विरोध प्रदर्शन लेली एगो गान बनी गेलै । महज ३५ वर्षक आ काठमाण्डौक पूर्व मेयर रहल ओ पारम्परिक राजनीतिक दल प्रति आक्रोशक लहरक लाभ उठाबय मे सफल रहलाह अछि । हुनकऽ अभियान केरऽ आधारशिला सबसें गरीब नागरिकऽ लेली स्वास्थ्य आरू शिक्षा छेलै, आरू हुनी "आसान रास्ता निकालै" के विरोध करलकै । एकरऽ विपरीत हुनकऽ कहना छै कि हुनी "देश क॑ परेशान करै वाला समस्या आरू विश्वासघात" के मूल कारण के सामना करै लेली प्रतिबद्ध छै ।

संवैधानिक विशेषज्ञ बिपिन अधिकारी ईएफई सँ बातचीत मे कहलनि जे, नेपाल मे पुरान दलक नियंत्रण सँ हटि जेबाक लेल परिवर्तनक लहर आबि रहल अछि, असली सवाल ई अछि जे की नवका नेता एहि लहर केँ बुझि एकरा कायम राखि सकैत छथि।

title: Balen's Breakthrough: Youth-Driven Political Upset in Nepal - Devdiscourse
description: Balen's Breakthrough: Youth-Driven Political Upset in Nepal  Devdiscourse
publisher.title: Devdiscourse
full_article:
In an unprecedented political upheaval, the Rashtriya Swatantra Party (RSP), spearheaded by Balendra Shah 'Balen', has emerged victorious in Nepal's general elections. The 35-year-old rapper-turned-politician secured a landslide with his party winning over two-thirds of the directly elected seats, signaling a rejection of legacy parties.

Balen's win in Jhapa-5 against four-time Prime Minister K P Sharma Oli epitomizes the shift in voter sentiment towards younger leadership. Balen is poised to become Nepal's Prime Minister, symbolizing a break from the old guard and a rising generational demand for change and good governance in the Himalayan nation.

This electoral outcome has resulted in significant losses for traditional parties, such as the Nepali Congress and CPN-UML, whose leaders have been ousted in former strongholds. Meanwhile, India observes the developments closely, hoping for political stability in Nepal to advance bilateral partnerships.

(With inputs from agencies.)
translated:
अभूतपूर्व राजनीतिक उथल-पुथल मे बलेन्द्र शाह ‘बलेन्’ केर नेतृत्व मे राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी नेपालक आम निर्वाचन मे विजयी उभरल अछि । 35 वर्षीय रैपर स राजनीतिज्ञ बनल एहि व्यक्ति कए सीधा चुनल गेल सीट क दू तिहाई स बेसी सीट पर हुनकर पार्टी जीतबा स भूस्खलन हासिल केलथि, जे विरासत पार्टी कए अस्वीकार करबाक संकेत देलक।

झापा-5 मे चार बेर के प्रधानमंत्री के पी शर्मा ओली के खिलाफ बैलेन के जीत मतदाता के भावना मे युवा नेतृत्व के प्रति बदलाव के प्रतिरूप अछि. बालेन नेपाल के प्रधानमंत्री बनय लेल तैयार अछि, जे पुरान पहरेदार सं विराम आ हिमालयी राष्ट्र मे परिवर्तन आ सुशासन के बढ़ैत पीढ़ी के मांग के प्रतीक अछि.

एहि चुनावी परिणामक परिणामस्वरूप नेपाली कांग्रेस आ नेकपा एमाले सन पारम्परिक दलक लेल काफी नुकसान भेल अछि, जकर नेता पूर्व गढ़ मे बेदखल भेल अछि । एम्हर भारत द्विपक्षीय साझेदारी के आगू बढ़ेबाक लेल नेपाल मे राजनीतिक स्थिरता के आशा करैत एहि घटनाक्रम के बारीकी सं देखैत अछि.

(एजेंसियों के इनपुट के साथ।)

title: Nepal’s rapper-led centrist party heads for poll landslide - thenews.pk
description: Nepal’s rapper-led centrist party heads for poll landslide  thenews.pk
publisher.title: thenews.pk
full_article:
Balendra Shah, a rapper-turned-politician and the prime ministerial candidate for RSP, greets his supporters as he celebrates after winning the election, in Damak, Jhapa district, Nepal on March 7, 2026. — Reuters

KATHMANDU: Nepal´s centrist RSP party of rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah had secured a majority in the direct parliamentary elections, partial official results showed on Sunday, and was heading for a landslide according to official trends.

The 35-year-old´s Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) was also leading in the proportional representation vote, according to results declared and election commission trends.

The vote was the first since deadly September 2025 youth anti-corruption protests toppled the government.

Shah himself had on Saturday defeated the veteran four-time prime minister KP Sharma Oli -- whose Marxist-led government was ousted in the violence last year -- in his own seat.

His victory over the 74-year-old Oli, and his rise from the capital´s mayor to potential prime minister, marks one of the most dramatic results in recent Nepali politics.

The September 2025 youth-led demonstrations, under a loose Gen Z banner, began over a brief social media ban but quickly tapped into broader grievances over corruption and a struggling economy.

Elections on Thursday chose a new 275-member House of Representatives, the lower house of parliament, with 185 seats chosen directly, and 110 by a proportional representation vote.

काठमाण्डु : नेपाल केरऽ केन्द्रवादी आरएसपी पार्टी रैपर स॑ राजनीतिज्ञ बनलऽ बलेन्द्र शाह न॑ सीधा संसदीय चुनाव म॑ बहुमत प्राप्त करी क॑ आंशिक आधिकारिक परिणाम म॑ रविवार क॑ पता चललै, आरू आधिकारिक प्रवृत्ति के अनुसार भूस्खलन के तरफ बढ़ी रहलऽ छेलै ।

घोषित परिणाम आ चुनाव आयोग के रुझान के अनुसार आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व वोट में 35 वर्षीय राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी सेहो अग्रणी छल।

सितंबर 2025 मे घातक युवा भ्रष्टाचार विरोधी विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद सरकार के गिराबय के बाद ई पहिल वोट छल.

शाह खुद शनिदिन चारि बेर के दिग्गज प्रधानमंत्री केपी शर्मा ओली के – जिनकर मार्क्सवादी नेतृत्व वाला सरकार पिछला साल हिंसा में बेदखल भ गेल छल – के अपन सीट पर हरा देने छलाह.

74 वर्षीय ओली पर हुनकऽ जीत, आरू राजधानी केरऽ मेयर स॑ संभावित प्रधानमंत्री के रूप म॑ हुनकऽ उदय, हाल केरऽ नेपाली राजनीति केरऽ सबस॑ नाटकीय परिणाम म॑ स॑ एक छै ।

सितंबर २०२५ केरऽ युवा नेतृत्व वाला प्रदर्शन, जेन जेड केरऽ ढीला बैनर के तहत, संक्षिप्त सोशल मीडिया प्रतिबंध के चलतें शुरू होलै लेकिन जल्दी ही भ्रष्टाचार आरू संघर्षशील अर्थव्यवस्था के व्यापक शिकायतऽ के फायदा उठाय लेलकै ।

गुरुवार कए भेल चुनाव मे 275 सदस्यीय नव प्रतिनिधि सभा, संसद क निचला सदन कए चुनल गेल, जाहि मे 185 सीट सीधा चुनल गेल, आ 110 सीट आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व वोट स चुनल गेल।

title: Rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah wins Nepal election - Peoples Gazette Nigeria
description: Rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah wins Nepal election  Peoples Gazette Nigeria
publisher.title: Peoples Gazette Nigeria
full_article:
Balendra Shah, popularly known as Balen, a Nepalese rapper-turned-politician, has defeated former Nepalese prime minister Sharma KP Oli in the election for the federal parliament.

(function(v, d, o, ai) { ai = d.createElement("script"); ai.defer = true; ai.async = true; ai.src = v.location.protocol + o; d.head.appendChild(ai); })(window, document, "//a.vdo.ai/core/v-gazettengr/vdo.ai.js");

Nepal, a South Asian country between India and China, had its general election on Thursday.

The election commission announced on Saturday that Mr Shah secured 68,348 votes, defeating Mr Oli, who polled 18,734 votes.

Early results show that Mr Shah’s party, the Rastriya Swatantra Party, is gaining more votes.

In September 2025, Mr Oli’s government banned several social media platforms, causing youths to protest.

The protests turned deadly, leaving at least 77 people killed after security forces opened fire on demonstrators.

Mr Shah publicly supported the protests and strongly criticised the government during the unrest, once describing Mr Oli as a “terrorist” who had betrayed the country.

After the protests, the government lifted the social media ban before Mr Oli resigned.

The 35-year-old politician, in his party’s manifesto released in February, promised to create 1.2 million jobs and reduce the large number of citizens leaving the country in search of work.

The party also pledged to significantly raise national income levels, expand healthcare protection, and accelerate economic growth over the next five years.

Mr Shah was born in Kathmandu, Nepal, in 1990 and studied civil engineering before entering the music industry, where his songs often criticised corruption, inequality, and poor governance, including his popular song “balidan,” a Nepali word meaning sacrifice.

He later moved into politics and gained national recognition after winning the Kathmandu mayoral election in 2022 as an independent candidate.

Mr Shah is now in line to become Nepal’s next prime minister if his party maintains its lead.

भारत आ चीन के बीच दक्षिण एशिया के देश नेपाल के आम चुनाव बृहस्पतिदिन भेल छल ।

चुनाव आयोग शनिदिन घोषणा केलक जे श्री शाह 68,348 वोट प्राप्त केलनि, जाहि मे श्री ओली के हरा देलखिन्ह जे 18,734 वोट के पोल केने छलाह.

शुरुआती नतीजा बता रहल अछि जे श्री शाह के पार्टी राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी के बेसि वोट मिल रहल अछि.

सितंबर 2025 म॑ श्री ओली केरऽ सरकार न॑ कईएक सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म प॑ रोक लगाय देलकै, जेकरा चलतें युवा सिनी न॑ विरोध प्रदर्शन करलकै ।

विरोध प्रदर्शन घातक भ गेल, सुरक्षा बल के प्रदर्शनकारी पर गोलीबारी के बाद कम सं कम 77 लोक के मौत भ गेल.

श्री शाह न॑ सार्वजनिक तौर प॑ विरोध प्रदर्शन के समर्थन करलकै आरू अशांति के दौरान सरकार केरऽ कड़ा आलोचना करलकै, एक बार श्री ओली क॑ देश के साथ धोखा करै वाला “आतंकवादी” बतैलकै ।

विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद सरकार श्री ओली के इस्तीफा देबय सं पहिने सोशल मीडिया पर रोक हटा देलक.

35 वर्षीय राजनेता फरवरी मे जारी अपन पार्टी के घोषणापत्र मे 12 लाख रोजगार पैदा करय के वादा केने छलाह आओर काज के तलाश मे देश छोड़य वाला नागरिक के भारी संख्या मे कमी करय के वादा केने छलाह.

पार्टी न॑ राष्ट्रीय आय केरऽ स्तर क॑ काफी बढ़ाबै के, स्वास्थ्य सेवा सुरक्षा के विस्तार करै के, आरू अगला पांच साल म॑ आर्थिक विकास म॑ तेजी लानै के भी वादा करलकै ।

श्री शाह केरऽ जन्म १९९० म॑ नेपाल केरऽ काठमांडू म॑ भेलऽ छेलै आरू संगीत उद्योग म॑ प्रवेश करै स॑ पहल॑ सिविल इंजीनियरिंग के पढ़ाई करलकै, जहां हुनकऽ गीतऽ म॑ अक्सर भ्रष्टाचार, असमानता, आरू खराब शासन के आलोचना करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै, जेकरा म॑ हुनकऽ लोकप्रिय गीत “बलिदान” भी शामिल छेलै, जे नेपाली शब्द छेकै जेकरऽ अर्थ बलिदान छै ।

बाद मे ओ राजनीति मे आबि 2022 मे काठमांडू मेयर चुनाव मे निर्दलीय उम्मीदवार के रूप मे जीत हासिल केलाक बाद राष्ट्रीय मान्यता प्राप्त केलनि।

श्री शाह आब नेपाल के अगिला प्रधानमंत्री बनय के लाइन मे छथिन्ह अगर हुनकर पार्टी अपन अगुवाई बरकरार राखत.

title: Rapper-Turned-Politician Shah Leads Against Nepal’s Ex-PM - themorningnews.com
description: Rapper-Turned-Politician Shah Leads Against Nepal’s Ex-PM  themorningnews.com
publisher.title: themorningnews.com
full_article:
What happens when a rapper steps into politics—and actually beats a former prime minister?

In Nepal, that question just turned into political reality.

Balendra Shah—better known to fans as Balen—has pulled off a stunning victory over former prime minister KP Sharma Oli in his own parliamentary constituency.

According to the Election Commission of Nepal, Shah secured 68,348 votes, far ahead of Oli’s 18,734.

The election, held Thursday, was the first since massive youth-led protests in September that toppled the government.

Those demonstrations—driven largely by Gen Z anger over social media bans and inequality—left 77 people dead and shook the country’s political establishment.

Now the momentum appears to be shifting. Shah’s party, the Rastriya Swatantra Party, is leading in both direct seats and proportional vote counts.

Raising the possibility of a landslide victory.

Youth Reshaping Politics

For decades, Nepal’s politics has been dominated by a handful of traditional parties.

But with 800,000 first-time voters, young people are rewriting the script.

Balendra Shah celebrating with supporters after defeating Nepalese Prime Minister Sharma KP Oli.

Shah, a familiar face in Nepal’s hip-hop scene—his song Balidan has millions of views—ran on promises of 1.2 million new jobs, higher incomes, and stronger social protections.

“I will be the candidate for all of Nepal,” he told the Financial Times during his campaign.

So is this just a viral political moment—or the start of a generational power shift?

Either way, Nepal’s playlist of politics just got a brand-new track.

नेपाल मे ओ प्रश्न बस राजनीतिक यथार्थ मे बदलि गेल।

बलेन्द्र शाह-जेकरा प्रशंसक सब बलेन के नाम सं बेसी जानल जाइत छथि- अपनहि संसदीय क्षेत्र में पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री केपी शर्मा ओली पर शानदार जीत हासिल केलनि अछि.

नेपालके निर्वाचन आयोगके अनुसार शाह ६८,३४८ मत प्राप्त कएने छल, जे ओलीके १८,७३४ मतसँ बहुत आगू अछि ।

गुरुवार क॑ आयोजित ई चुनाव सितंबर म॑ युवा सिनी के नेतृत्व म॑ भारी विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद पहलऽ चुनाव छेलै जेकरा स॑ सरकार गिरी गेलऽ छेलै ।

ओ प्रदर्शन-जेन जेड केरऽ बहुत हद तक सोशल मीडिया प्रतिबंध आरू असमानता प॑ आक्रोश स॑ संचालित-77 लोगऽ के मौत होय गेलै आरू देश केरऽ राजनीतिक संस्थापन क॑ हिला देलकै ।

आब गति बदलैत देखा रहल अछि। शाह के पार्टी राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी सीधा सीट आओर आनुपातिक वोट गिनती दुनु मे अग्रणी अछि.

भूस्खलन जीत के संभावना बढ़ा रहल अछि।

युवा राजनीति के पुनर्गठन

दशकों स नेपाल के राजनीति पर मुट्ठी भर पारंपरिक दल के बोलबाला अछि.

मुदा पहिल बेर 8 लाख वोटर के संग युवा सभ पटकथा के फेर सं लिखि रहल छथिन्ह.

नेपालके प्रधानमन्त्री शर्मा केपी ओलीके पराजित कर समर्थकके साथ जश्न मनाते बलेन्द्र शाह ।

नेपाल के हिप-हॉप दृश्य के परिचित चेहरा शाह-हुनकर गीत बलिदान के लाखों व्यूज अछि-12 लाख नव नौकरी, बेसी आमदनी, आ मजबूत सामाजिक सुरक्षा के वादा पर चलल.

अपन प्रचारक दौरान फाइनेंशियल टाइम्स स बातचीत मे ओ कहला जे हम समस्त नेपाल क उम्मीदवार बनब।

त की ई मात्र वायरल राजनीतिक क्षण अछि-या पीढ़ी के सत्ता परिवर्तन के शुरुआत?

कोनो तरहेँ नेपाल’क राजनीति’क प्लेलिस्ट मे एखन एकदम नव ट्रैक भेटल.

title: Nepal votes for a new dawn - Tribune India
description: Nepal votes for a new dawn  Tribune India
publisher.title: Tribune India
full_article:
NEPAL has made a clean break with the past. The sweeping victory of the Rashtriya Swatantra Party (RSP) in the national elections and the rise of 35-year-old rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah, popularly known as Balen, signal a dramatic rejection of the country’s entrenched political order. In a nation where fragile coalitions have long been the norm, the electorate has delivered a powerful message: the old guard has failed miserably. The fledgling RSP’s spectacular electoral show reflects deep public frustration with legacy parties such as the Nepali Congress and the Communist Party of Nepal (Unified Marxist-Leninist). Even stalwarts like former Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli suffered humiliating defeats. Balen himself defeated Oli by a huge margin, such was the intensity of voters’ anger against the established political elite.

Balen’s march has been remarkable. Having first gained prominence when he won the Kathmandu mayoral poll as an Independent in 2022, he has successfully channelled Gen Z frustration into a national political movement. His victory embodies the aspirations of Nepal’s youth, who mobilised through street protests and social media to demand an end to corruption, nepotism and misgovernance. Balen is poised to become Nepal’s youngest PM and its first Madhesi to occupy the coveted post. The mandate for change is unmistakable. Nepal has seen 14 governments in the past 18 years, with veteran leaders playing musical chairs for the PM’s post. The challenges before the new rulers are formidable: tackling corruption, reviving a struggling economy and ensuring political stability.

Political tremors in Kathmandu have slowed down bilateral projects, even as pro-China leaders such as Oli have often struck a discordant note. If the RSP government pursues pragmatic diplomacy, Nepal stands to gain by reinforcing its traditional ties with India.

नेपाल अतीत स साफ-सुथरा ब्रेक लेलक अछि। राष्ट्रीय चुनाव म॑ राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी केरऽ व्यापक जीत आरू 35 साल केरऽ रैपर स॑ राजनीतिज्ञ बनलऽ बलेन्द्र शाह, जेकरा लोकप्रिय रूप स॑ बलेन के नाम स॑ जानलऽ जाय छै, के उदय देश केरऽ जड़ जमाय क॑ खड़ा राजनीतिक व्यवस्था क॑ नाटकीय रूप स॑ अस्वीकार करै के संकेत दै छै । जे राष्ट्र म॑ नाजुक गठबंधन बहुत दिन स॑ आदर्श रहलऽ छै, वू राष्ट्र म॑ मतदाता न॑ एगो सशक्त संदेश देल॑ छै कि पुरानऽ गार्ड बुरी तरह स॑ विफल होय गेलऽ छै । नवोदित आरएसपी केरऽ शानदार चुनावी शो म॑ नेपाली कांग्रेस आरू नेपाल कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी (एकीकृत मार्क्सवादी-लेनिनवादी) जैसनऽ विरासत दलऽ स॑ गहरा जन कुंठा के झलक मिलै छै । पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री केपी शर्मा ओली सन दिग्गज के सेहो अपमानजनक हार के सामना करय पड़लन्हि. बालेन स्वयं ओली के भारी अंतर सं हरा देलखिन्ह, स्थापित राजनीतिक अभिजात वर्ग के खिलाफ मतदाता के आक्रोश के एतेक तीव्रता छल.

बालेन’क मार्च उल्लेखनीय रहल अछि. 2022 म॑ निर्दलीय के रूप म॑ काठमांडू केरऽ मेयर केरऽ चुनाव जीतला प॑ सबसें पहलऽ प्रमुखता हासिल करी क॑ जेन जेड केरऽ कुंठा क॑ राष्ट्रीय राजनीतिक आन्दोलन म॑ सफलतापूर्वक चैनलित करी चुकलऽ छै । हुनकऽ जीत म॑ नेपाल केरऽ युवा सिनी के आकांक्षा समाहित छै, जे सड़कऽ प॑ विरोध प्रदर्शन आरू सोशल मीडिया के माध्यम स॑ भ्रष्टाचार, भतीजावाद आरू कुशासन के अंत के मांग करै लेली जुटलऽ छेलै । बलेन नेपाल केरऽ सबसें कम उम्र के पीएम आरू ओकरऽ पहिलऽ मधेसी बन॑ लेली तैयार छै जे ई प्रतिष्ठित पद प॑ कब्जा करी रहलऽ छै । परिवर्तन के जनादेश अचूक अछि। नेपाल मे पिछला 18 साल मे 14टा सरकार देखल गेल अछि, जाहि मे पीएम पद लेल दिग्गज नेता संगीत क कुर्सी बजबैत छथि। नबका शासक के सामने चुनौती भयंकर छै: भ्रष्टाचार स॑ निपटना, संघर्षशील अर्थव्यवस्था क॑ पुनर्जीवित करना आरू राजनीतिक स्थिरता सुनिश्चित करना ।

title: Ex-rapper is on course to lead Nepal as prime minister - Yahoo
description: Ex-rapper is on course to lead Nepal as prime minister  Yahoo
publisher.title: Yahoo
full_article:
A former rapper who played a leading role in the Gen Z protests that toppled Nepal’s political old guard is on track to become the country’s next prime minister.

Balendra Shah and his Rastriya Swatantra Party are poised to secure the biggest landslide in Nepal’s modern electoral history following Thursday’s election.

Shah rose to fame after the youth-led protests, sparked by a social media ban, rocked the country last year. The unrest was part of a global wave of protests led by young people fed up with corruption and rising costs.

But to actually drive change, Shah will have to make the kind of political deals for which he “has so far shown sneering distaste,” The New York Times wrote.
translated:
नेपाल केरऽ राजनीतिक पुरानऽ गार्ड क॑ गिरै वाला जेन जेड विरोध प्रदर्शन म॑ अग्रणी भूमिका निभै वाला एगो पूर्व रैपर देश केरऽ अगला प्रधानमंत्री बन॑ के रास्ता प॑ छै ।

गुरुवार के चुनाव के बाद नेपाल के आधुनिक चुनावी इतिहास के सबस पैघ भूस्खलन के लेल बलेन्द्र शाह आओर हुनकर राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी तैयार अछि.

पिछला साल सोशल मीडिया प्रतिबंध के कारण युवा नेतृत्व वाला विरोध प्रदर्शन देश के हिला देला के बाद शाह के प्रसिद्धि बढ़ल छल. ई अशांति भ्रष्टाचार आरू बढ़तऽ लागत स॑ तंग आबी गेलऽ युवा सिनी के नेतृत्व म॑ विरोध के वैश्विक लहर के हिस्सा छेलै ।

लेकिन वास्तव म॑ परिवर्तन क॑ बढ़ाबै लेली शाह क॑ वू तरह के राजनीतिक सौदा करै ल॑ पड़तै, जेकरा लेली हुनी “अभी तलक खिसियाबै वाला नापसंदगी देखैल॑ छै,” द न्यूयॉर्क टाइम्स न॑ लिखलकै ।

title: Ex-rapper Balendra Shah set to be Nepal PM after party’s landslide election win - The Guardian
description: Ex-rapper Balendra Shah set to be Nepal PM after party’s landslide election win  The GuardianNepal election 2026 results - follow live  BBCGen Z-Backed Rapper Is on Course to Lead Nepal With Landslide Win  The New York TimesA new Nepali party, led by an ex-rapper, is set for a landslide win in parliamentary election  NPRRapper-turned-politician Balen Shah’s RSP heads for poll landslide in Nepal  Al JazeeraInside the Nepal campaign that could vault Balendra Shah to power  ReutersNepal Election Results 2026 Live: Rapper-turned-politician Balen Shah led RSP set to form government after decisive victory  The Times of IndiaEx-rapper's political party leads early results in Nepal's first election since 2025 Gen Z revolt  NBC NewsTale Of Two Protests: How Balen Shah Trumped In Nepal, But Bangladesh's Students' Party Failed  NDTV
publisher.title: The Guardian
full_article:
Balendra Shah, the rapper turned politician and popular figurehead of a gen Z revolution, looks set to become Nepal’s next prime minister after his party won by an unprecedented margin.

Shah, known widely as Balen, and his Rastriya Swatantra party (RSP) secured a rare landslide victory in the first election since youth-led protests during which dozens were killed and the former government was toppled.

“It is the victory of hope and change,” said Ramesh Paudyal, a senior RSP leader. “It is the most beautiful endorsement of the gen Z movement. The true tribute to the gen Z martyrs will be expressed through the work carried out every day by the government led by Balendra Shah.”

The public upset and anger at the political old guard was evident in the results, with veteran parties and their leaders losing vast numbers of seats. Balen’s RSP, which was formed only three years ago by a former TV executive, was handed a rare outright majority.

View image in fullscreen Supporters of Balendra Shah celebrating in Damak, Jhapa district. Photograph: Adnan Abidi/Reuters

Nepal’s electoral system – which combines a first past the post system with proportional representation – has tended to result in weak coalition governments. But as counting reached its final stages, RSP had won at least 122 out of 165 direct seats and was leading in three more, putting the party on course for the biggest electoral majority since Nepal became a democracy.

The final election results, which will include additional seats appointed through proportional representation, are expected in the coming days.

Nepal’s gen-Z election: can popular former rapper Balen topple a veteran political heavyweight? Read more

The contest was considered one of the most significant and gripping in years, pitting the heavyweights who have dominated Nepal’s politics for decades against a younger generation pledging to end corruption and bring about a fresh start for the country.

Despite being relatively new to politics, Shah, 35, had been seen as the frontrunner, running a dynamic campaign that tapped into the hunger for change, particularly among young Nepalis.

An engineer by training, Shah rose to fame as a rapper whose tracks took aim at poverty, unemployment and corruption. In 2022, he pivoted to public office, running independently to become the mayor of Kathmandu. After winning a strong majority, he began the mammoth task of cleaning up the city, including removing unauthorised buildings and sorting out rubbish.

But it was the youth uprising in September last year that elevated Shah to national prominence. After protests suddenly erupted, sparked by a ban on social media but driven by a larger frustration at lack of opportunities, the government hit back with force and 19 protesters were killed.

The uprising spiralled into wider unrest and arson attacks that left 70 dead, and resulted in the resignation of the government led by the four-time prime minister KP Sharma Oli and his veteran Communist party.

1:21 Nepal's prime minister quits after deaths at protests sparked by social media ban – video

The speed at which the government was toppled left many in the movement in shock. Shah was the favoured choice by the gen Z protest leaders to become interim prime minister, but he declined and instead chose to wait to run until formal elections were held on 5 March.

In a symbol of the battle between the old guard and the new generation, Shah chose to stand in the Jhapa-5 constituency, running directly against 74-year-old Oli.

Shah’s overwhelming victory was finally declared on Saturday night: by 68,348 votes to 18,724 for Oli. As he conceded victory, the former prime minister said he wished Shah an “uninterrupted five-year term, heartfelt best wishes”.

Arriving to pick up his certificate of election in his signature dark sunglasses and black blazer, Shah emerged from the sunroof of his vehicle and held up a banner bearing the words: “Congratulations to all of you, this is your victory.”

In Jhapa-5, there was much jubilance at his win. “One of the main factors behind the gen Z movement, KP Oli, has been defeated. It feels like justice has been delivered to the martyrs,” said Aditya Karna, 23. “Now there is an expectation that Balen will lead the country toward a better future.”

Bhawana Raut, a leader of the gen Z movement who voted in Jhapa, said the result meant there could finally be “healing” after the violence unleashed in the September protests. “This sends a clear message to everyone who comes to power: you must be accountable,” she said. “Even leaders who rose after such a huge struggle can be brought down to zero by voters in a single moment. The government must be a servant of the people, not a ruling authority.”

Nonetheless, analysts emphasised that Shah had a daunting task head of him, including managing the high expectations placed upon him by the younger generation. Among the promises made during his campaign was to investigate and prosecute previous leaders for entrenched corruption, and the Oli government for its role in killing gen Z protesters.

“The public has many aspirations and many desires,” said the political analyst Lok Raj Baral. “They have placed extremely high hopes, but in a country like Nepal it is very difficult to deliver. The bureaucracy remains the same old one, only the political leadership is new.”

With Nepal landlocked between India and China – whose competing interests have often run roughshod over domestic needs – many emphasised how important foreign policy would be in Balen’s premiership.

Baral added: “They won a majority largely because they convinced people that they would work for good governance. That mandate is positive. But from the moment Balen becomes prime minister, challenges will be waiting for him at every step.”
translated:
जेन जेड क्रांति केरऽ रैपर स॑ राजनीतिज्ञ आरू लोकप्रिय हस्ती बनलऽ बलेन्द्र शाह अपनऽ पार्टी केरऽ अभूतपूर्व अंतर स॑ जीत के बाद नेपाल केरऽ अगला प्रधानमंत्री बन॑ वाला नजर आबी रहलऽ छै ।

युवा सब के नेतृत्व में भेल विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद पहिल चुनाव में शाह, जेकरा बलेन के नाम स जानल जाय छै, आरू हुनकऽ राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी (आरएसपी) न॑ दुर्लभ भूस्खलन जीत हासिल करलकै, जेकरा दौरान दर्जनों लोगऽ के मौत होय गेलै आरू पूर्व सरकार क॑ गिराय देलऽ गेलै ।

आरएसपी के वरिष्ठ नेता रमेश पौद्यल कहलनि जे, ई आशा आ परिवर्तन के जीत अछि। “जेन जेड आन्दोलन केरऽ सबसें सुन्दर समर्थन छेकै, जेन जेड शहीदऽ के प्रति सच्चा श्रद्धांजलि बलेन्द्र शाह के नेतृत्व म॑ सरकार द्वारा रोज करलऽ जाय वाला काम के माध्यम स॑ व्यक्त करलऽ जैतै।”

राजनीतिक बूढ़ गार्ड पर जनता के परेशानी आ आक्रोश परिणाम में स्पष्ट छल, जाहि में दिग्गज दल आ ओकर नेता के भारी संख्या में सीट के नुकसान भेल। बालेन केरऽ आरएसपी, जेकरऽ गठन महज तीन साल पहलें एगो पूर्व टीवी एग्जीक्यूटिव न॑ करलकै, क॑ दुर्लभ एकदम बहुमत मिललै ।

View image in fullscreen झापा जिला के दमक में बलेन्द्र शाह के समर्थक जश्न मनाते हुए। फोटोग्राफ : अदनान अबिदी/रायटर

नेपाल केरऽ चुनावी व्यवस्था – जेकरा म॑ पहिलऽ अतीत केरऽ पद प्रणाली के साथ आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व के संयोजन छै – के परिणामस्वरूप गठबंधन सरकार कमजोर होय के प्रवृत्ति रहलऽ छै । लेकिन गिनती के अंतिम चरण में पहुँचला के साथ आरएसपा 165 सीधा सीट में से कम से कम 122 सीट जीती क॑ तीन आरू सीट पर अग्रणी छेलै, जेकरा स॑ नेपाल लोकतंत्र बनला के बाद स॑ पार्टी क॑ सबसें बड़ऽ चुनावी बहुमत के रास्ता प॑ आबी गेलऽ छेलै ।

आगामी दिन मे आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व के माध्यम सं नियुक्त अतिरिक्त सीट शामिल होए वाला अंतिम चुनाव परिणाम के उम्मीद अछि.

नेपाल के जेन-जेड चुनाव : लोकप्रिय पूर्व रैपर बेलेन कोनो दिग्गज राजनीतिक हैवीवेट के गिरा सकैत छथिन्ह? आगू पढ़ू

ई प्रतियोगिता क॑ सालऽ म॑ सबस॑ महत्वपूर्ण आरू मनमोहक मुकाबला म॑ स॑ एक मानलऽ गेलै, जेकरा म॑ दशकों स॑ नेपाल केरऽ राजनीति प॑ हावी रहलऽ भारी-भरकम लोगऽ क॑ भ्रष्टाचार क॑ खतम करी क॑ देश लेली नया शुरुआत करै के वादा करै वाला युवा पीढ़ी के खिलाफ खड़ा करी देलऽ गेलै ।

राजनीति मे अपेक्षाकृत नव रहला के बादो 35 वर्षीय शाह के अग्रणी के रूप मे देखल गेल छल, जे एकटा गतिशील अभियान चला रहल छल जे परिवर्तन के भूख के टैप केलक, खास क युवा नेपाली के बीच।

प्रशिक्षण के आधार पर इंजीनियर शाह एकटा रैपर के रूप में प्रसिद्धि के लेल बढ़ल जेकर ट्रैक गरीबी, बेरोजगारी आ भ्रष्टाचार के निशाना बना लेलक। 2022 मे ओ सार्वजनिक पद पर पिवट केलनि, स्वतंत्र रूप सँ काठमांडू के मेयर बनेबाक लेल चुनाव लड़लनि । मजबूत बहुमत जीतला के बाद ओ शहर के साफ-सफाई के विशाल काज शुरू केलनि, जाहि में अनधिकृत भवन के हटाबय आ कचरा के छाँटब सेहो शामिल छल.

मुदा पिछला साल सितंबर मे युवा विद्रोह छल जे शाह कए राष्ट्रीय स्तर पर पहुंचा देलक। सोशल मीडिया पर प्रतिबंध के कारण अचानक विरोध के भड़कला के बाद मुदा अवसर के कमी सं पैघ कुंठा के कारण सरकार जबरदस्ती जवाबी हमला केलक आ 19 प्रदर्शनकारी के मौत भ गेल.

ई विद्रोह व्यापक अशांति आरू आगजनी म॑ बदली गेलै जेकरा म॑ ७० लोगऽ के मौत होय गेलै, आरू एकरऽ परिणामस्वरूप चार बार के प्रधानमंत्री केपी शर्मा ओली आरू हुनकऽ अनुभवी कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी के नेतृत्व म॑ सरकार न॑ इस्तीफा द॑ देलकै ।

1:21 सोशल मिडिया प्रतिबंधक कारणेँ भेल विरोध प्रदर्शनमे मृत्यु भेलाक बाद नेपालक प्रधानमन्त्री पद छोड़ल – भिडियो

सरकार के जे रफ्तार स उखाड़ल गेल ओहि स आन्दोलन मे बहुतो गोटे सदमा मे पड़ि गेल। शाह अंतरिम प्रधानमंत्री बनय लेल जेन जेड विरोध प्रदर्शन के नेता सब के पसंदीदा पसंद छल, मुदा ओ मना क देलखिन्ह आओर एकर बदला मे 5 मार्च के औपचारिक चुनाव होए तक चुनाव लड़य के इंतजार करय के फैसला केलनि.

पुरान गार्ड आ नव पीढ़ी क बीच लड़ाई क प्रतीक मे शाह झापा-5 क्षेत्र मे ठाढ़ हेबाक विकल्प चुनलथि, जे सीधा 74 वर्षीय ओली क खिलाफ दौड़लथि।

शाह केरऽ भारी जीत के घोषणा आखिरकार शनिदिन रात होय गेलै: ओली केरऽ 68,348 वोट के साथ 18,724 वोट स॑ । जीत स्वीकार करतें हुअ॑ पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री न॑ कहलकै कि हुनी शाह क॑ “निर्बाध पांच साल केरऽ कार्यकाल, दिल स॑ शुभकामना” चाहै छै ।

अपन सिग्नेचर डार्क धूप-चश्मा आ कारी रंगक ब्लेज़र मे अपन चुनाव प्रमाणपत्र लेबय पहुँचि शाह अपन गाड़ीक सनरूफ सँ बाहर निकलि एकटा बैनर उठौलनि जाहि पर लिखल छल: “अहाँ सभ केँ बधाई, ई अहाँक जीत अछि।”

झापा-5 मे हुनकर जीत पर बहुत उल्लास भेल। 23 वर्षीय आदित्य कर्ण कहलनि जे, जेन जेड आंदोलन के पाछु एकटा मुख्य कारक केपी ओली के हार भ गेल अछि, एहन लागैत अछि जेना शहीद के न्याय भ गेल अछि।

झापा मे मतदान करय वाला जेन जेड आंदोलन के नेता भावना राउत के कहनाय छनि जे एहि परिणाम के मतलब अछि जे सितंबर के विरोध मे भेल हिंसा के बाद आखिरकार “चंगाई” भ सकैत अछि. ओ कहली जे एहि स सत्ता मे आबय वाला सब गोटे कए एकटा साफ संदेश भेटैत अछि जे अहां कए जवाबदेह हेबाक चाही। ओ कहला जे एतेक पैघ संघर्ष क बाद उठल नेता कए सेहो मतदाता एक क्षण मे शून्य पर उतारल जा सकैत अछि। सरकार जनताक सेवक हेबाक चाही, शासक अधिकार नहि।”

एकरऽ बावजूद विश्लेषकऽ न॑ ई बात प॑ जोर देलकै कि शाह केरऽ एगो कठिन टास्क हेड छै, जेकरा म॑ युवा पीढ़ी द्वारा हुनका स॑ करलऽ गेलऽ उच्च उम्मीद के प्रबंधन भी शामिल छै । हुनकऽ अभियान के दौरान जे वादा करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै ओकरा म॑ जड़ जमाय क॑ भ्रष्टाचार के मामला म॑ पिछला नेता सिनी के जांच आरू मुकदमा चलाबै के, आरू जेन जेड प्रदर्शनकारी के हत्या म॑ अपनऽ भूमिका के लेलऽ ओली सरकार प॑ भी मुकदमा चलाबै के वादा भी शामिल छेलै ।

राजनीतिक विश्लेषक लोकराज बराल कहलनि जे, जनता के बहुत आकांक्षा आ बहुत इच्छा अछि। “ओ सब अत्यंत बेसी आशा रखने छथि, मुदा नेपाल सन देश मे एकरा पूरा करब बहुत कठिन अछि। नौकरशाही ओहिना पुरान अछि, केवल राजनीतिक नेतृत्व नव अछि।”

भारत आरू चीन के बीच नेपाल लैंडलॉक होय गेलऽ छै – जेकरऽ प्रतिस्पर्धी हित अक्सर घरेलू जरूरतऽ प॑ रूखा-सूखा चलै छै – बहुत लोगऽ न॑ ई बात प॑ जोर देलकै कि बेलेन केरऽ प्रीमियरशिप म॑ विदेश नीति कतनी महत्वपूर्ण होतै ।

बरल आरू कहलकै, "हुनी सब क॑ बहुमत बहुत हद तलक ऐसनऽ वजह स॑ मिललै कि हुनी लोगऽ क॑ ई बात लेली राजी करी लेलकै कि हुनी सुशासन लेली काम करतै, वू जनादेश सकारात्मक छै ।लेकिन जब॑ स॑ बेलेन प्रधानमंत्री बनतै, तब॑ स॑ हर कदम प॑ चुनौती हुनकऽ इंतजार करतै।"

title: Gen Z protest deaths in Nepal: Inquiry panel for action against those behind crackdown - The Indian Express
description: Gen Z protest deaths in Nepal: Inquiry panel for action against those behind crackdown  The Indian Express
publisher.title: The Indian Express
full_article:
A high-level Commission of Inquiry, to probe into the abuse of authority and state force during the Gen Z anti-corruption protest on September 8 last year, submitted its report to Nepal’s interim government on Sunday, recommending investigation and action against those involved in ordering and executing the crackdown.

The commission, however, has not identified any individuals for action, but made it clear that those who ordered the use of force, those who carried out the order and those who did not make any effort to stop it should be investigated, tried and punished under the criminal law.

This comes a day after rapper-turned-politician Balen­dra Shah ‘Balen’ defeated four-time PM K P Sharma Oli and the Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) decimated traditional political parties in the general elections. RSP won 122 of 165 directly elected seats in the House of Representative elections, according to the Election Commission (EC). The EC has announced results for 159 seats as of 8.30 pm.

Nepal's centrist RSP party of rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah had secured a majority in the direct parliamentary elections, partial official results showed Sunday, and was heading for a landslide according to official trends.

title: 1,000-page Gen Z probe report submitted to Nepal govt, legal action recommended - The Morning Voice
description: 1,000-page Gen Z probe report submitted to Nepal govt, legal action recommended  The Morning Voice
publisher.title: The Morning Voice
full_article:
A high-level commission investigating the deadly Gen Z protests in Nepal last September has submitted its 1,000-page report to the interim government, blaming administrative inefficiency, governance failures, and politicisation of institutions for the unrest.

The judicial inquiry , led by former Supreme Court justice Gauri Bahadur Karki , handed the report to Interim Prime Minister Sushila Karki at Singhdurbar on Sunday. While the report highlighted systemic failures, it did not publicly disclose the names of those responsible for shootings or other incidents.

During the two-day unrest, a total of 76 people lost their lives, including 22 on September 8 and 54 on September 9 , while over 2,000 others were injured . The protests erupted over a controversial social media ban , corruption, nepotism, and frustration with political stagnation. Large-scale arson and vandalism hit government offices, leading to 267 arrests .

According to the commission, the violence was primarily caused by misgovernance and inefficiency , compounded by the politicisation of bureaucracy and judiciary , which deepened public distrust. The report recommended legal action against those who ordered, carried out, or failed to prevent the shootings of Gen Z protesters. It also documented facts impartially , based on witness accounts, official statements, and evidence collected during the investigation.

The commission noted structural gaps in governance and constitutional bodies that delayed effective response during the crisis. It also suggested reforms to prevent similar unrest in the future, including measures to restore public trust, strengthen institutional accountability, and address youth grievances .

The inquiry was originally given three months to complete its work but received three extensions , totaling 75 additional days. It was expected before the March 5 general elections, held after former Prime Minister K.P. Sharma Oli resigned following the protests. Analysts said these elections were a referendum on governance and youth demands , with outcomes likely to reshape Nepal’s political landscape.

Civil society groups and opposition leaders had repeatedly demanded early disclosure of the report. Justice Karki warned that failure to implement recommendations could trigger renewed Gen Z movements , highlighting the urgency of action.

The interim government has promised compensation for victims’ families and support for the injured , while planning reforms to prevent future unrest. Nepal now faces the challenge of rebuilding public confidence and addressing youth concerns effectively.
translated:
पिछला सितम्बर मे नेपाल मे भेल घातक जेन जेड विरोध प्रदर्शन के जांच करय वाला उच्च स्तरीय आयोग एहि अशांति के लेल प्रशासनिक अक्षमता, शासन विफलता, संस्था के राजनीतिकरण के जिम्मेदार ठहरबैत अपन एक हजार पन्ना के रिपोर्ट अंतरिम सरकार के देलक अछि.

सुप्रीम कोर्ट के पूर्व न्यायाधीश गौरी बहादुर कार्की के नेतृत्व में न्यायिक जांच रविदिन सिंहदुरबार में अंतरिम प्रधानमंत्री सुशीला कार्की के रिपोर्ट सौंपलक। रिपोर्ट म॑ सिस्टमिक विफलता प॑ प्रकाश डाललऽ गेलऽ छै, लेकिन गोलीबारी या अन्य घटना लेली जिम्मेदार लोगऽ के नाम के खुलासा सार्वजनिक रूप स॑ नै करलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

दू दिन के अशांति के दौरान कुल 76 लोक के जान गेल छल जाहि मे 8 सितंबर के 22 आओर 9 सितंबर के 54 लोक के जान गेल छल , जखन कि 2000 सं बेसि लोक घायल भ गेल छल . विरोध प्रदर्शन एकटा विवादित सोशल मीडिया प्रतिबंध , भ्रष्टाचार, भतीजावाद, आ राजनीतिक ठहराव सं कुंठा के ल क भड़कल छल. सरकारी कार्यालय मे पैघ पैमाना पर आगजनी आ तोड़फोड़ भेल जाहि सं 267 लोक के गिरफ्तारी भेल .

आयोग के अनुसार हिंसा मुख्य रूप स कुशासन आ अक्षमता के कारण भेल छल , जेकरा नौकरशाही आ न्यायपालिका के राजनीतिकरण के कारण आओर बढ़ल छल , जाहि स जन अविश्वास गहरा भ गेल छल | रिपोर्ट म॑ जेन जेड प्रदर्शनकारी के गोलीबारी के आदेश दै वाला, अंजाम दै वाला या रोकै म॑ विफल रहला के खिलाफ कानूनी कार्रवाई के सिफारिश करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै । ई निष्पक्ष रूप स॑ तथ्यऽ के दस्तावेजीकरण भी करलकै , गवाहऽ के बयान, आधिकारिक बयान, आरू जांच के दौरान एकत्रित सबूतऽ के आधार प॑ ।

आयोग न॑ शासन आरू संवैधानिक निकाय म॑ संरचनात्मक अंतराल के नोट करलकै जेकरा स॑ संकट के दौरान प्रभावी प्रतिक्रिया म॑ देरी होय गेलै । भविष्य म॑ भी ऐसनऽ अशांति क॑ रोकै लेली सुधार के सुझाव देल॑ छै, जेकरा म॑ जनविश्वास बहाल करै, संस्थागत जवाबदेही क॑ मजबूत करै, आरू युवा सिनी के शिकायतऽ के समाधान के उपाय शामिल छै ।

जांच कए मूल रूप स अपन काज पूरा करबा लेल तीन मास क समय देल गेल छल मुदा तीनटा एक्सटेंशन भेटल , कुल 75 दिन अतिरिक्त। एकरऽ उम्मीद ५ मार्च क॑ होबै वाला आम चुनाव स॑ पहल॑ छेलै, जे पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री के.पी. विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद शर्मा ओली इस्तीफा द देलखिन्ह. विश्लेषक के कहनाय छनि जे ई चुनाव शासन आओर युवा के मांग पर जनमत संग्रह अछि , जकर परिणाम सं नेपाल के राजनीतिक परिदृश्य के नव रूप देबय के संभावना अछि.

नागरिक समाज के समूह आ विपक्षी नेता बेर-बेर रिपोर्ट के जल्दी खुलासा करय के मांग केने छलाह. जस्टिस कार्की न॑ चेतावनी देलकै कि सिफारिश क॑ लागू नै करला स॑ नयका जेन जेड आंदोलन शुरू होय सकै छै , जेकरा म॑ कार्रवाई के तात्कालिकता प॑ प्रकाश डाललऽ गेलऽ छै ।

अंतरिम सरकार पीड़ित परिवार के मुआवजा आ घायल के सहयोग के वादा केलक अछि , जखन कि भविष्य में अशांति के रोकय लेल सुधार के योजना बना रहल अछि. नेपाल के सामने आब जनविश्वास के पुनर्निर्माण आ युवा सरोकार के प्रभावी ढंग स संबोधित करबाक चुनौती अछि।

title: Rapper turned politician Balen Shah poised to become Nepal’s youngest PM - The Morning Voice
description: Rapper turned politician Balen Shah poised to become Nepal’s youngest PM  The Morning Voice
publisher.title: The Morning Voice
full_article:
One of the biggest political stories emerging from India’s neighbourhood is unfolding in Nepal, where a dramatic election result has pushed 35-year-old rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah , popularly known as Balen, to the brink of national leadership. His party, the Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) , has delivered a stunning performance in the country’s parliamentary elections and is expected to form the next government.

Nepal’s 275-member House of Representatives is elected through a mixed system, with 165 lawmakers chosen through direct voting and 110 through proportional representation . According to the Election Commission of Nepal , the RSP secured 72 of the first 90 declared seats and was leading in many more constituencies, placing it in a commanding position in the race to form the government.

At the centre of this political surge is Shah, a structural engineer who first gained recognition as a hip-hop artist before stepping into public life. He rose to national prominence in 2022 after winning the Kathmandu mayoral election as an independent candidate on a platform focused on transparency, anti-corruption measures and urban governance reforms. His strong appeal among young voters and effective use of social media helped him build a nationwide following.

In the latest election, Shah contested from Jhapa-5 constituency , where he defeated veteran leader and four-time prime minister K. P. Sharma Oli of the Communist Party of Nepal (Unified Marxist–Leninist) by a margin of nearly 50,000 votes , securing 68,348 votes against Oli’s 18,734 .

If the final results confirm the trend, Shah could soon be invited to form the government and take the oath of office, potentially becoming the youngest prime minister in Nepal’s history . Political observers say the RSP’s rise reflects growing public frustration with established parties and a strong demand for generational change, accountability and cleaner governance in the Himalayan nation.
translated:
भारत केरऽ पड़ोस स॑ निकलै वाला एगो बड़ऽ राजनीतिक कहानी नेपाल म॑ खुल॑ लगलऽ छै, जहां एगो नाटकीय चुनावी परिणाम न॑ ३५ वर्षीय रैपर स॑ राजनीतिज्ञ बनलऽ बलेन्द्र शाह , जेकरा लोकप्रिय रूप स॑ बलेन के नाम स॑ जानलऽ जाय छै, क॑ राष्ट्रीय नेतृत्व के कगार प॑ पहुँचाय देल॑ छै । हुनकऽ पार्टी राष्ट्रिय स्वतंत्र पार्टी (आरएसपी) न॑ देश केरऽ संसदीय चुनाव म॑ शानदार प्रदर्शन करलकै आरू ओकरा अगला सरकार बनाबै के उम्मीद छै ।

नेपाल केरऽ २७५ सदस्यीय प्रतिनिधि सभा मिश्रित प्रणाली के माध्यम स॑ चुनलऽ जाय छै, जेकरा म॑ १६५ विधायक क॑ प्रत्यक्ष मतदान के माध्यम स॑ आरू ११० विधायक आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व के माध्यम स॑ चुनलऽ जाय छै । नेपालके निर्वाचन आयोगके अनुसार आरसपा पहिल ९० घोषित सीटमे ७२ सीट सुरक्षित कएने छल आ आर कतेको क्षेत्रमे अग्रणी रहल छल, जाहिसँ सरकार बनेबाक दौड़मे ओकरा कमांडिंग पोजीशनमे राखल गेल छल ।

ई राजनीतिक उछाल के केंद्र में शाह छै, जे एगो संरचनात्मक अभियंता छै, जेकरा सार्वजनिक जीवन में कदम रखै स॑ पहल॑ सबसें पहल॑ हिप-हॉप कलाकार के रूप म॑ पहचान मिललै । पारदर्शिता, भ्रष्टाचार विरोधी उपाय आ शहरी शासन सुधार पर केन्द्रित मंच पर निर्दलीय उम्मीदवार के रूप मे काठमांडू मेयर के चुनाव जीतला के बाद 2022 मे राष्ट्रीय स्तर पर पहुंचल छलाह. युवा मतदाता के बीच हुनकऽ मजबूत अपील आरू सोशल मीडिया के प्रभावी उपयोग न॑ हुनका देशव्यापी फॉलोइंग बनाबै म॑ मदद करलकै ।

ताजा चुनाव मे शाह झापा-5 क्षेत्र सं चुनाव लड़लनि , जतय ओ नेपाल कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी (एकीकृत मार्क्सवादी–लेनिनवादी) के दिग्गज नेता आ चारि बेर के प्रधानमंत्री के.

अगर अंतिम परिणाम एहि रुझान के पुष्टि करैत अछि त शाह के जल्दिये सरकार बनाबय आओर पद के शपथ लेबय लेल आमंत्रित कएल जा सकैत अछि, जे संभावित रूप सं नेपाल के इतिहास मे सभ सं कम उम्र के प्रधानमंत्री बनि सकय छथिन्ह . राजनीतिक पर्यवेक्षकऽ के कहना छै कि आरएसपी केरऽ उदय स्थापित दलऽ के प्रति बढ़तऽ जन कुंठा आरू हिमालयी राष्ट्र म॑ पीढ़ीगत बदलाव, जवाबदेही आरू स्वच्छ शासन केरऽ मजबूत मांग क॑ दर्शाबै छै ।

title: Ek Mutthi Badal to be released on May 15 - The Rising Nepal
description: Ek Mutthi Badal to be released on May 15  The Rising Nepal
publisher.title: The Rising Nepal
full_article:
By A Staff Reporter,Kathmandu, Mar. 9: Ek Mutthi Badal: My Share of Sky is set to be released in cinemas across Nepal on May 15.

According to a press release issued by the production company Gauthali Entertainment, the film is a family drama that explores the emotional tensions within a Nepali household spanning three generations.

Set over the course of a single day, Ek Mutthi Badal: My Share of Sky follows a family navigating expectations, sacrifice and personal aspirations against the backdrop of a rapidly changing Nepali society, the statement said.

The film is written and directed by Sahara Sharma. With this project, Sharma also became the first Nepali woman filmmaker to receive the Hubert Bals Fund + Europe Post-Production Grant, one of the world’s most respected funding initiatives supporting independent cinema.

The film is produced by Abhimanyu Dixit, with Nikun Shrestha serving as executive producer. The producing team also includes German producer Sara Fazilat, alongside Samipya Raj Timalsena and Anup Poudel.

In 2021, Dixit received the Rotterdam Lab Award at the NFDC Film Bazaar in India, recognising him as an emerging South Asian producer. The project has also participated in several international development and industry initiatives, including programmes linked to the Marché du Film in France, the Locarno Open Doors Consultancy in Switzerland, and the West Meets East Screenplay Lab.

The film features performances by Aanchal Sharma, Sahayog Adhikari, Nisha Sharma, Sekhar Chapagain and Usha Rajak, among others.

Its cinematography is directed by Linh Dan Nguyen Phan, who made history as the first Vietnamese woman to shoot a feature film; this project marks her seventh feature. Production design is by Yashasvi Sabharwal, whose work on All We Imagine as Light contributed to the film winning the Grand Prix at the Cannes Film Festival. Editing is by acclaimed Indian editor Deepa Bhatia, known internationally for her work on Taare Zameen Par.
translated:
By A Staff Reporter,काठमांडू, 9 मार्च: एक मुट्ठी बादल: माय शेयर ऑफ स्काई 15 मई कए पूरा नेपाल मे सिनेमाघर मे रिलीज होबय जा रहल अछि।

प्रोडक्शन कंपनी गौथली इन्टरटेनमेंट द्वारा जारी प्रेस विज्ञप्ति के अनुसार ई फिल्म एकटा पारिवारिक नाटक अछि जे तीन पीढ़ी के नेपाली घर के भीतर के भावनात्मक तनाव के खोज करैत अछि ।

एक मुट्ठी बादल: माय शेयर ऑफ स्काई एक दिन के क्रम में सेट करलऽ गेलऽ ई फिल्म तेजी स॑ बदलतऽ नेपाली समाज के पृष्ठभूमि म॑ अपेक्षा, त्याग आरू व्यक्तिगत आकांक्षा के नेविगेट करै वाला परिवार के अनुसरण करै छै, विज्ञप्ति म॑ कहलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

ई फिल्म के लेखन आरू निर्देशक सहारा शर्मा के छै । ई परियोजना के साथ शर्मा स्वतंत्र सिनेमा के समर्थन करै वाला दुनिया केरऽ सबसें सम्मानित फंडिंग पहलऽ म॑ स॑ एक ह्यूबर्ट बाल्स फंड + यूरोप पोस्ट-प्रोडक्शन ग्रांट प्राप्त करै वाला पहिलऽ नेपाली महिला फिल्म निर्माता भी बनलै ।

फिल्म के निर्माता अभिमन्यु दीक्षित छैथ, जाहि में निकुन श्रेष्ठ कार्यकारी निर्माता के रूप में काज क रहल छैथ। निर्माता टीम में जर्मन निर्माता सारा फजीलात के संग समप्य राज तिमलसेना आ अनुप पौडेल सेहो शामिल छथि ।

2021 म॑ दीक्षित क॑ भारत केरऽ एनएफडीसी फिल्म बाजार म॑ रॉटरडैम लैब अवार्ड मिललै, जेकरा म॑ हुनका दक्षिण एशिया केरऽ एगो उभरतऽ निर्माता के रूप म॑ पहचानलऽ गेलै । ई परियोजना न॑ कई अंतर्राष्ट्रीय विकास आरू उद्योग पहलऽ म॑ भी भाग लेल॑ छै, जेकरा म॑ फ्रांस केरऽ मार्चे डु फिल्म, स्विट्जरलैंड केरऽ लोकार्नो ओपन डोर्स कंसल्टेंसी, आरू वेस्ट मीट्स ईस्ट पटकथा लैब स॑ जुड़लऽ कार्यक्रम शामिल छै ।

फिल्म मे आंचल शर्मा, सहयोग अधिकारी, निशा शर्मा, सेखर चपागाईन आ उषा रजक सहित अन्य लोकनिक प्रस्तुति अछि ।

एकरऽ छायांकन केरऽ निर्देशन लिन्ह दान गुयेन फान न॑ करलकै, जे फीचर फिल्म केरऽ शूटिंग करै वाला पहिलऽ वियतनामी महिला के रूप म॑ इतिहास रचलकै; ई परियोजना हुनकऽ सातवाँ विशेषता छेकै । प्रोडक्शन डिजाइन यशस्वी सभरवाल केरऽ छै, जेकरऽ ऑल वी इमेजिन एज लाइट केरऽ काम न॑ ई फिल्म क॑ कान फिल्म फेस्टिवल म॑ ग्रांड प्रिक्स जीतै म॑ योगदान देलकै । संपादन प्रशंसित भारतीय संपादक दीपा भाटिया के छै, जे तारे जमीन पार पर अपनऽ काम लेली अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर प॑ जानलऽ जाय छै ।

title: Nepal rejects the old, but the new is overstated - The Indian Express
description: Nepal rejects the old, but the new is overstated  The Indian Express
publisher.title: The Indian Express
full_article:
Advertisement

Television commentaries and op-eds have interpreted the result as evidence of a magnetic pull towards a “new” political force. Only a few have questioned what is actually “new” here. The RSP not only contested previous elections but also joined coalition governments led by the very parties now dismissed as “old”. To sustain the dominant narrative, commentators highlight the emergence of new faces — not the novelty of the party itself. The “old versus new” dichotomy may sound appealing, but it is misleading. If voters were truly attracted to new faces, the turnout should have increased. Instead, it remained around 60 per cent, lower than in previous elections.

A more plausible explanation is the deep-seated aversion toward the old guard. Public resentment toward traditional political forces stemmed not only from corruption and nepotism, but also from the dominance of an ageing political leadership. Anyone presenting themselves as young and new is seen as a challenger to a political culture tarnished by elite lifestyles and corruption scandals.

This aversion did not arise suddenly. In fact, it developed within the old parties themselves, fuelled by complaints and media coverage of self-aggrandisement, nepotism, and patronage. Otherwise, how could influential parties like the Communist Party of Nepal (Unified Marxist–Leninist) (CPN-UML) and the Nepali Congress (NC) perform so poorly? The result suggests that many of their own supporters chose not to vote for them. Some reports have loosely compared RSP’s victory with that of the Maoists in 2008, but the contexts differ significantly. First, the current result reflects revenge voting, triggered when party cadres were denied tickets or when grassroots workers felt that unpopular candidates had been imposed upon them by the leadership. Second, factional rivalries encouraged voters to support candidates from other parties.

Advertisement

Losses in constituencies traditionally dominated by the old guard also reveal how the general and special conventions organised by both CPN-UML and the NC before the election deepened internal divisions and discontent. Party members dissatisfied with the leadership effectively weaponised the ballot. In many cases, they even encouraged family members, acquaintances, and allies to vote independently. Although family-level polarisation over candidate preferences is not new in Nepal, it is now driven less by ideological commitment than by a broader anti-establishment impulse.

Against this backdrop, the RSP’s electoral success places a heavy burden on its shoulders. The real challenge lies in moving from demagogic rhetoric to institutional governance. The absence of a strong opposition does not mean that the promised transformation will occur as quickly as scrolling through a reel. The structural challenges awaiting them in office may soon give impulsive voters reason to complain — and perhaps, to regret their choice.
translated:
विज्ञापन

टेलीविजन केरऽ कमेंट्री आरू ओपी-एड्स न॑ ई परिणाम क॑ “नयऽ” राजनीतिक शक्ति के तरफ चुंबकीय खींचऽ के प्रमाण के रूप म॑ व्याख्या करलकै । किछुए गोटे मात्र एहि पर सवाल उठौने छथि जे वास्तव मे एतय की “नव” अछि । आरएसपी न सिर्फ पिछला चुनाव लड़लक बल्कि गठबंधन सरकार मे सेहो शामिल भ गेल जेकर नेतृत्व ठीक ओहि दल के छल जेकरा आब “पुरान” कहि बर्खास्त क देल गेल अछि। प्रबल कथ्य के कायम रखबाक लेल टिप्पणीकार नव चेहरा के उदय पर प्रकाश दैत छथि — पार्टी के स्वयं नवीनता पर नहि । “पुरान बनाम नव” द्विविधा आकर्षक लागत, मुदा ई भ्रामक अछि । अगर सही मायने मे मतदाता नव चेहरा दिस आकर्षित होइतथि त मतदान बढ़बाक चाही छल। बल्कि ई लगभग 60 प्रतिशत रहल जे पिछला चुनाव के मुकाबले कम अछि.

एकरऽ बेसी व्यावहारिक व्याख्या छै बूढ़ऽ पहरेदार के प्रति गहींर घृणा । पारंपरिक राजनीतिक शक्ति के प्रति जन आक्रोश खाली भ्रष्टाचार आरू भतीजावाद स॑ ही नै, बल्कि एगो वृद्ध राजनीतिक नेतृत्व के वर्चस्व स॑ भी उपजलऽ छेलै । जे कियो अपना क॑ युवा आरू नया के रूप म॑ पेश करै छै ओकरा अभिजात वर्ग के जीवनशैली आरू भ्रष्टाचार के घोटाला स॑ कलंकित राजनीतिक संस्कृति के चुनौती दै वाला के रूप म॑ देखलऽ जाय छै ।

ई विरक्ति अचानक नहि उठल । असल में एकर विकास स्वयं पुरान दलक भीतर भेल, जकर ईंधन आत्म-बढ़ाव, भतीजावाद, आ संरक्षणक शिकायत आ मीडिया कवरेज सं भेल. अन्यथा नेपाल कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी (एकीकृत मार्क्सवादी–लेनिनवादी) (नेकपा एमाले) आ नेपाली कांग्रेस (नेकपा) सन प्रभावशाली दल एतेक खराब प्रदर्शन कोना क सकैत छल ? परिणाम स॑ लगै छै कि हुनकऽ खुद के बहुत सारा समर्थक हुनका वोट नै दै के फैसला करलकै । किछ रिपोर्ट मे आरएसपी के जीत के तुलना 2008 मे माओवादी सं कएल गेल अछि, मुदा संदर्भ मे काफी अंतर अछि. पहिल, वर्तमान परिणाम बदला लेबय के वोटिंग के दर्शाबैत अछि, जे तखन शुरू भेल जखन पार्टी के कार्यकर्ता के टिकट सं मना क देल गेल छल या जमीनी स्तर के कार्यकर्ता के लागल जे नेतृत्व के तरफ सं हुनका पर अलोकप्रिय उम्मीदवार थोपल गेल अछि. दोसर, गुटबाजी के प्रतिद्वंद्विता मतदाता के दोसर पार्टी के उम्मीदवार के समर्थन करय लेल प्रोत्साहित केलक.

विज्ञापन

परंपरागत रूप स॑ पुरानऽ गार्ड केरऽ बोलबाला वाला क्षेत्रऽ म॑ नुकसान स॑ ई भी पता चलै छै कि चुनाव स॑ पहल॑ नेकपा एमाले आरू नेकपा दूनू द्वारा आयोजित सामान्य आरू विशेष अधिवेशन न॑ कोना आतंरिक विभाजन आरू असंतोष क॑ गहरा करलकै । नेतृत्व स असंतुष्ट पार्टी के सदस्य प्रभावी ढंग स मतदान कए हथियारबंद क देलथि। बहुत मामला में त परिवार के सदस्य, परिचित, आ सहयोगी के स्वतंत्र रूप स वोट देबय लेल सेहो प्रोत्साहित केलखिन्ह. यद्यपि नेपाल मे उम्मीदवारक वरीयता पर परिवार स्तरीय ध्रुवीकरण कोनो नव बात नहि अछि, मुदा आब एकरा व्यापक संस्थापन विरोधी आवेग सं बेसी वैचारिक प्रतिबद्धता सं कम संचालित भ' रहल अछि.

एहि पृष्ठभूमि मे आरएसपी के चुनावी सफलता ओकर कान्ह पर भारी बोझ डालैत अछि. असली चुनौती जनमत संग्रह स संस्थागत शासन दिस बढ़बा मे अछि। प्रबल विरोध के अभाव के मतलब ई नै छै कि वादा करलऽ गेलऽ परिवर्तन ओतने जल्दी होय जैतै जेतना जल्दी रील के माध्यम स॑ स्क्रॉल करलऽ जाय छै । पद पर हुनका सब के इंतजार करय वाला संरचनात्मक चुनौती जल्दिये आवेगपूर्ण मतदाता के शिकायत करय के कारण द सकैत अछि — आ शायद, अपन पसंद के पछतावा करय के.

publisher.title: Dunya News
full_article:
ISLAMABAD (Dunya News) - Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Muhammad Ishaq Dar has congratulated the people and leadership of Nepal on successful conclusion of general elections in the country. In a post on X, Ishaq Dar said Pakistan deeply values its fraternal relations with Nepal. My heartiest congratulations to the people and leadership of #Nepal on the successful conclusion of the general elections. Pakistan deeply values its fraternal relations with Nepal. I look forward to working closely with my counterpart and the new government to further… — Ishaq Dar (@MIshaqDar50) March 8, 2026 The Deputy Prime Minister said he looks forward to working closely with his counterpart and the new government in Nepal to further strengthen enduring friendship between the two countries. He also emphasized the need to explore new avenues for enhancing bilateral cooperation as well as promoting regional peace and prosperity. title: Nepal business representative expresses confidence in China's reliable legal services - China Daily
description: Nepal business representative expresses confidence in China's reliable legal services  China Daily
publisher.title: China Daily
full_article:
Bishnu Prasad Dumaru, Director of the Yiwu Representative Office of the Nepal-China Chamber of Commerce and Industry, highlighted the significant improvement of China's business environment, with rules becoming clearer and more transparent.

Clear provisions governing every step, from contracts to customs and taxes, have given foreign investors a strong sense of security, he said. He also expressed hope that procuratorial organs would offer foreign-related legal services on a regular basis and in a more refined manner, such as multilingual guidance and rapid response mechanisms for commercial disputes.
translated:
नेपाल-चीन उद्योग वाणिज्य संघक यिवु प्रतिनिधि कार्यालयके निदेशक बिष्णुप्रसाद दुमारु चीनक व्यापारिक वातावरणमे महत्वपूर्ण सुधार पर प्रकाश देलनि, जाहिमे नियम स्पष्ट आ पारदर्शी भऽ रहल अछि ।

ओ कहला जे अनुबंध स ल कए सीमा शुल्क आ कर तक क हर कदम कए नियंत्रित करय वाला स्पष्ट प्रावधान स विदेशी निवेशक कए सुरक्षा क मजबूत भावना भेटल अछि। हुनी ई भी आशा व्यक्त करलकै कि प्रोक्यूरेटरी अंग नियमित रूप स॑ आरू अधिक परिष्कृत तरीका स॑ विदेश स॑ जुड़लऽ कानूनी सेवा प्रदान करतै, जेना कि बहुभाषी मार्गदर्शन आरू व्यावसायिक विवादऽ लेली तेजी स॑ प्रतिक्रिया तंत्र ।

title: Balen Shah: the rapper who became Nepal’s prime minister - Asia Media Centre
description: Balen Shah: the rapper who became Nepal’s prime minister  Asia Media Centre
publisher.title: Asia Media Centre
full_article:
If you scroll through TikTok or Instagram today, you will see young Nepalis proudly introducing their new prime minister.

In short celebratory reels (like the screenshot here - credits: preet_manandhar) they list the details with a mix of humour and pride. Thirty-five years old. An engineer. A former rapper.

For many young people in Nepal, the rise of Balendra Shah, widely known as Balen, feels personal. He is not just another politician. He is someone who once criticised the political system through music and social media and has now become the person leading it.

There is a sense of symmetry in the moment. Just months ago, many of these same young people were on the streets protesting after the government restricted internet access and social media platforms. The anger spilled online through memes, reels and the now widely shared “Nepo Kids” trend, where young Nepalis mocked political privilege and dynasties.

Today the conversation has returned to the same platforms, but this time in celebration.

It is no surprise that Balen’s victory marks a striking moment in Nepal’s politics. But it did not happen suddenly. It follows months of youth protests, digital organising and growing frustration with a political class that many young voters felt no longer represented them.

Nepal has seen frequent changes in government over the past decade, with coalition politics and leadership struggles often leaving many citizens disillusioned with traditional parties.

A protest movement shaped online

The mood that helped propel Balen into power began building last year.

Many young Nepalis were angered when the government moved to restrict social media platforms. For a generation that communicates, debates and organises online, the move quickly became a flashpoint.

Protests spread across cities, led largely by students and young professionals. But the movement was also deeply digital.

As we reported earlier about Nepal’s Gen Z uprising, young Nepalis used humour, memes and online communities to organise and express political frustration.

Memes, reels and street protests all carried the same message. Many young Nepalis wanted a different kind of leadership. Image/AMC

One such community, Youth Against Corruption, gathered more than 160,000 members online.

Participants also turned to the messaging platform Discord, where the group hosted live debates about the country’s political future and ran an open poll on possible interim leaders. The online vote favoured former Supreme Court chief justice Sushila Karki, who was later appointed interim prime minister after political negotiations.

Another trend that spread online was the phrase “Nepo Kids”. Young people used it ironically to criticise what they saw as political privilege and the children of powerful elites.

Memes, reels and street protests all carried the same message. Many young Nepalis wanted a different kind of leadership.

The rise of an unlikely political figure

Balendra Shah emerged as a figure who seemed to capture that mood.

Long before entering politics, he was known in Nepal’s music scene. His rap songs often spoke about corruption, social problems and everyday frustrations with governance.

The music gave him a large following among younger audiences. But it was his move into politics that surprised many observers.

In 2022 Balen ran as an independent candidate for mayor of Kathmandu. He won the election in a major upset, defeating candidates from established political parties.

As mayor he built a reputation for visible reforms in the capital. His administration pushed urban clean up drives, removed illegal structures and introduced new skills programmes for young people.

Supporters often described his leadership style as direct and practical.

An engineer with an India connection

Before politics and music, Balen was an engineering student.

After completing a civil engineering degree in Kathmandu, he pursued a master's degree in structural engineering at Visvesvaraya Technological University in Karnataka, India.

That detail may seem small, but it reflects a broader regional pattern. Many Nepali students pursue higher education in India, particularly in engineering and medicine.

For readers in New Zealand, it is a reminder that South Asia remains deeply interconnected. Education, migration and professional networks frequently cross borders.

From mayor to national leader

In the recent election Balen joined the Rastriya Swatantra Party, a relatively new political party that has positioned itself as an alternative to traditional political forces.

He went on to defeat veteran politician K P Sharma Oli, a four-time prime minister and one of the most powerful figures in Nepali politics.

Political analyst Chandra Dev Bhatta described the result as a sign of deeper frustration among voters (before the results).

“This is heading to a landslide victory. This reflects the frustration that has been building up,” he told AFP. “It is actually the people’s revolt against the established political parties.”

Others say the scale of the political shift surprised even seasoned observers.

“This is even a bigger upset than we expected. It underscores the level of public disenchantment with the old parties for under-performance, as well as anger over the events of September,” Kunda Dixit, publisher of Nepali Times , told AFP.

For many observers the contest symbolised a generational shift. On one side stood a leader associated with the country’s long established political order. On the other stood a younger figure who had built his public profile outside traditional party structures.

A political moment shaped by youth

Now that Balen has taken office, social media offers a glimpse into how many young Nepalis see the moment.

Short videos circulate online showing students cheering in the streets. Others jokingly compare the new prime minister to older leaders who have dominated politics for decades.

The tone is often playful. But the message is serious. For many young voters, Balen’s victory feels like proof that their voices are beginning to shape the country’s future.

Why this matters for New Zealand

Nepal is a comparatively small, landlocked country with 29.6 million people.

But it sits at a strategic crossroads between India and China, and political developments there often reflect wider shifts in South Asian politics. The country also has strong people-to-people links across the region through education, migration and trade.

For New Zealand readers trying to understand the changing dynamics of South Asia, Nepal’s latest political transition offers a glimpse of how younger leaders and new political movements are beginning to reshape the region.

What comes next

Balen now takes office at a complicated moment for Nepal.

The country faces economic pressures, high levels of youth migration and the challenge of balancing relations with its two powerful neighbours, India and China.

Expectations are high. Supporters hope the energy that helped bring Balen into power will translate into real changes in governance.

Whether that happens remains to be seen.

But one thing already feels clear.

A generation that once organised protests through memes, reels and online communities has now helped propel one of its own into the country’s highest office.

And fittingly, the story of that political shift is still unfolding on the very same platforms where it began.
